title: FOOD PANTRY AND FREE FOOD MARKET - 211info
text: MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY FOOD PANTRY AND FREE FOOD MARKET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping-style food pantry with dairy, baked goods, produce, meat, and perishable items. Additional fresh food is available from food retrieved from grocery stores twice a month as part of the Fresh Alliance program. 370 SW Culver Highway Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Pantry: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm, 3rd Wednesday of the month 5pm-6pm (April-October) Free Food Market: 2nd and 4th Wednesday, sign up 4pm and doors open 4:30pm until all food has been distributed Email (541) 325-1747 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 325-1747 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Jefferson and Wasco Counties Services: Food Pantries Fresh Food Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME FOOD DELIVERY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY
